---
title: "Major Charles George Heathcote"
---

## Major Charles George Heathcote

**Dates:** (1843-1924)

### Description

army officer

### Biography

Son of Sir William Heathcote, 5th Bt., by his second marriage.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from December 30 [1871]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
